languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

languages.text: "Вероятно, вас интересует мой прогресс по изготовлению обещанного вам оружия. Имея возможность сфокусироваться на изучении артефакта, я смог модифицировать плазменное ружье, раскрыв его истинный потенциал с помощью... неконвенциональных методик. Я надеюсь, что данное творение вам угодит".

"You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

Я надеюсь, что данное творение вам угодит".

"You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

languages.text: «Se estará preguntando por mi progreso en el arma que le prometí. Dada la oportunidad de concentrarme en el estudio del artefacto, pude modificar un rifle de plasma tras descubrir su verdadero potencial por medios... poco convencionales. Espero que esta creación sea de su agrado».
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

traits.locale_text: «Se estará preguntando por mi progreso en el arma que le prometí. Dada la oportunidad de concentrarme en el estudio del artefacto, pude modificar un rifle de plasma tras descubrir su verdadero potencial por medios... poco convencionales. Espero que esta creación sea de su agrado».

languages.text: “您一定想知道，我答应您的那件武器做得怎么样了。有机会专心研究那件造物后，在……一些非常规手段的帮助下，我发现了它真正的潜力，成功改装了一把等离子枪。希望这件作品能合您的心意。”
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

traits.locale_text: “您一定想知道，我答应您的那件武器做得怎么样了。有机会专心研究那件造物后，在……一些非常规手段的帮助下，我发现了它真正的潜力，成功改装了一把等离子枪。希望这件作品能合您的心意。”

languages.text: « Vous vous demandez sûrement où en est mon travail sur l'arme que je vous ai promise. Ayant pu me concentrer sur l'étude de l'artefact, je suis parvenu à modifier un fusil à plasma, après avoir découvert son véritable potentiel par des... méthodes peu conventionnelles. J'espère que cette petite création vous plaira. »
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous demandez sûrement où en est mon travail sur l'arme que je vous ai promise. Ayant pu me concentrer sur l'étude de l'artefact, je suis parvenu à modifier un fusil à plasma, après avoir découvert son véritable potentiel par des... méthodes peu conventionnelles. J'espère que cette petite création vous plaira. »

languages.text: "Ihr fragt Euch vermutlich, wie es um die Waffe steht, die ich Euch versprach. Angesichts der Möglichkeit, mich auf das Studium des Artefaktes zu konzentrieren, konnte ich einen Plasmawerfer modifizieren, nachdem ich sein wahres Potenzial mittels ... unkonventioneller Methoden erkannt hatte. Ich hoffe, diese Kreation ist nach Eurem Geschmack."
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr fragt Euch vermutlich, wie es um die Waffe steht, die ich Euch versprach. Angesichts der Möglichkeit, mich auf das Studium des Artefaktes zu konzentrieren, konnte ich einen Plasmawerfer modifizieren, nachdem ich sein wahres Potenzial mittels ... unkonventioneller Methoden erkannt hatte. Ich hoffe, diese Kreation ist nach Eurem Geschmack."

languages.text: "約束した武器の進捗状況が気になっていることだろう。アーティファクトの特性に直接注目する機会を得て、私はプラズマ銃を改造することができた。そのショットは屈折トランスミューターの特性を模倣しており、金属や機械の分子シフトを引き起こす。この作品がお気に召すことを願っています」。
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus directly on the properties of the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun — its shots mimic the properties of the refractive transmuter, triggering a molecular shift in metals and machinery. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

languages.text: "Size söz verdiğim silah konusundaki ilerlememi merak ediyorsunuzdur. Eseri incelemeye odaklanma fırsatı bulduğumda, alışılmadık yöntemlerin de... Yardımıyla gerçek potansiyelini keşfettikten sonra bir plazma tabancasını modifiye edebildim. Umarım bu yaratımı beğenirsiniz."
languages.original_text: "You must be wondering about my progress on the weapon I promised you. Given the opportunity to focus on studying the artefact, I was able to modify a plasma gun, after discovering its true potential with the help of... unconventional methods. I hope you find this creation to your liking."

traits.locale_text: "Size söz verdiğim silah konusundaki ilerlememi merak ediyorsunuzdur. Eseri incelemeye odaklanma fırsatı bulduğumda, alışılmadık yöntemlerin de... Yardımıyla gerçek potansiyelini keşfettikten sonra bir plazma tabancasını modifiye edebildim. Umarım bu yaratımı beğenirsiniz."
